COMMENT: 
There are two cost/use categories from the IP data files: Acute and the OIP. 
Costs that beneficiaries are liable for are described in detail on the Medicare.gov website. There is a 
CMS publication called "Your Medicare Benefits,” which explains the deductibles and coinsurance 
amounts.
